mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (conversation_id, sender_id, content_type, content, file_url, file_name, file_size, send_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{sendTime})
mapper.select: SELECT content FROM chat_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY send_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
